# Our midnight goal will stun the establishment:

So we're doing that again with a new fundraising goal: by midnight tonight, raising $5 million since the polls closed in Michigan.
[**Contribute $3 to our campaign now and help us reach this goal by midnight to show our momentum after the huge win in Michigan.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/5-million-michigan?refcode=em160309therm-v2-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/5-million-michigan?refcode=em160309therm-v2-full")
We stunned the media and political establishment last night with our game-changing win in Michigan.
Reaching our goal of raising $5 million for Bernie coming out of this victory would stun them again. So let's show the establishment what we're made of.

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: It's not enough to be angry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
Anger is not enough here. | Friend --

I’m about to head onstage for another debate with Senator Sanders, and right now, **[I need to know you’re with me.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjQ5MzY5NzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYxNjkyMTMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

As last night’s results in Michigan proved, we still have a tough fight ahead of us in this primary. And our fight only gets tougher if we win the nomination: Every last one of us will need to work together to take down Donald Trump and the Republicans. Trump has already won 15 contests, and he’s going to keep spreading his message of anger and divisiveness until someone stands up and stops him.

Don’t get me wrong -- Americans have a reason to be angry. We should be angry that gun violence claims 30,000 American lives every year, that African American kids are 500 times more likely to die from asthma than white kids, and that millions of people in our country still don’t have health care.

But anger isn’t enough. On this team, when we face tough problems, we roll up our sleeves and make something good happen. That’s exactly what we’ve done on this campaign, and that’s exactly what we’re going to do if we win the White House.

**I can’t get there without you. If you’re with me, chip in to the March Victory Fund right now, and let’s win this nomination and take on Trump together:**

We can't get outraised. | Friend --

Senator Sanders and I debated for the seventh time tonight -- and as the results from Michigan show, this race is far from over.

His team has defied expectations over and over again, outraising our organization by $12 million last month and winning states like Colorado, Minnesota, and Kansas.

But I know what this team is capable of doing when we come together -- and I'm so grateful for it. If we put in the work for the next six days, we can make history.

name: Rand Paul
subject: They can't be serious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Patriot,
American taxpayers should not be forced to
pay for fighter jets for Pakistan.
It's as simple as that.
I cannot watch America crumble at home while
politicians tax hard working individuals to pay for corrupt
governments that fund terrorism and laugh in our faces.
Everyone agrees Pakistan has aided terrorism
and participates in an arms race that threatens American security
on every level.
And both sides of the aisle are ready to
continue business as usual?
They cannot be serious.
If Pakistan truly wants to help end the war
on terror, they shouldn't need U.S. military technology to do it.

That's why I'm standing strong to put an end
to U.S. arms sales to Pakistan NOW and I need your help.
Please watch this video to hear more.

You know you can count on me to vote for
American interests.
I won't back down on this, but I'm counting
on you to stand with me.
If you support American security and fiscal
responsibility, please sign this petition and consider a generous
donation of $50, $25, or $10.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

subject: Hillary spent $90k on WHAT?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Dear Patriot,
Some things you just can't make up . . .

Recent news reports say that Hillary Clinton
spent $90,000 paying consultants to come up a 13-song playlist
for her to use on the campaign trail.

$90,000!

With "leaders" like this, is it any wonder
why our nation is $19 TRILLION in debt?

Patriot, I ran for the U.S. Senate to steer
our nation away from the fiscal train wreck we can all see
coming.

Today, I'm asking you to do as much as you
can with your most generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10.

It's not often that I offer to do Hillary
Clinton any favors, but just this once, I will be giving free
advice on what her playlist should be.

How about Fleetwood Mac's "Little Lies?"

Or Bonnie Raitt's "I Can't Make You Love Me?"

Or the Police's "Every Breath You Take"
because her NSA loves spying on us all?

Patriot, all joking aside, if you want to
know what's wrong with Washington, D.C., this is Exhibit A.

The same big spending candidates -- bloated
with cash from high-powered Wall Street fat-cats and insiders --
are every bit as reckless with our tax dollars once elected.

I'm fighting every day in the U.S. Senate to
stop this madness.

But I'm counting on you to stand with me.

So please agree to your most generous
contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away.

In liberty,

Rand Paul

Patriot, all joking aside, if you want to know what's wrong with Washington, D.C., this is Exhibit A. The same big spending candidates -- bloated with cash from high-powered Wall Street fat-cats and insiders -- are every bit as reckless with our tax dollars once elected. I'm fighting every day in the U.S. Senate to stop this madness. But I'm counting on you to stand with me. So please agree to your most generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away. Friend,

There's no other way to say this: we will lose.

If we hand the conservative movement over to Donald Trump by making him the Republican nominee, we will lose.

It will be the most devastating setback to our cause in two generations -- and once that happens we may never have time to correct the course our country is on today.

**A new poll out shows that if Donald Trump becomes our nominee, he will lose to Hillary Clinton by 13 points, the most catastrophic electoral landslide in decades.**

It will be a total repudiation of the conservative agenda by the American people. We will lose all of the gains we have made since the Reagan Revolution.

Whatever issue is the most important to you -- the Second Amendment, the dignity of life, traditional values, economic mobility, a strong military, freedom from government overreach -- it's all on the line.

And if Donald Trump were to win Florida next week, he takes a huge step toward being our nominee, and the disaster that will follow. But it doesn't have to be that way.

If you help me win in Florida, I will be our party's nominee, I will unite our conservative movement, and I will win in November.

Trump had nothing to say in response.** OK, in fairness, on Israel, Trump was able to point out a key accomplishment of his own: One time he was the grand marshal of the Israel parade on Fifth Avenue. But while Trump's been leading parades, Marco's been fighting for Floridians, racking up accomplishments on issues from Israel to veterans. That's why he can wipe the floor with Trump in a debate, and it's why he's going to beat Trump in Florida on Tuesday. But we still need your help to close this out -- the media's going to keep pushing their favorite candidate, Donald Trump. name: Ted Cruz's iPad
subject: sorry for the late note
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
I'm sorry to be emailing so late, but this couldn't wait. After the events of tonight's GOP debate -- I felt that it was important that I talk to you. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34092705:sgTooHCVN:m:1:1104269936:06B0EA4B2C5D67B39786E849ACE94383:r)
---
Friend,

I'm sorry to be emailing so late, but this couldn't wait.

After the events of tonight's GOP debate -- I felt it was important that I talk to you.

Conservatives are in a tough spot, and you and I are the only ones left to stand up BEFORE Donald Trump drags our conservative values over the cliff.

Tonight, I need your help. This morning, we launched a $2.5M dollar money bomb, which is a fancy way of saying that's what it is going to take for my campaign to defeat Trump at the polls on Super Tuesday -- when millions of Americans vote to determine the next Republican nominee.

[ DONATE NOW ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34092706:sgTooHCVN:m:1:1104269936:06B0EA4B2C5D67B39786E849ACE94383:r)

Our nation and our party are searching for leadership after the last eight years under Barack Obama.

Friend, as of right now, I am the only candidate with a window of opportunity to defeat Donald Trump for the nomination AND beat Hillary Clinton in the general election.

To protect religious liberty, secure our nation's borders, defend the Constitution, and dismantle the wasteful federal bureaucracy, it is going to take hard work -- beginning with defeating Donald Trump.

So, I'm coming to you tonight, Friend, to humbly ask for your support, prayers, and financial support.

I know the toll this race has taken on the both of us, but I must come to you now and ask.

If you would click the donate button below and make the largest gift you can afford, Heidi and I would be so grateful.

[ DONATE NOW ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34092706:sgTooHCVN:m:1:1104269936:06B0EA4B2C5D67B39786E849ACE94383:r)

Because, Friend, whether we like it or not, this election is going to change the direction of our country...but only you can make it for the better.

If we can raise the $2.5M in time, I have a chance to make sure that happens.

[**Will you make your best donation right now and help me for the good of our country?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34092705:sgTooHCVN:m:1:1104269936:06B0EA4B2C5D67B39786E849ACE94383:r)

Again, apologies for the late hour, but this message could not wait.

There's hope, but we must fight for it!

For liberty,
Ted Cruz

[ DONATE NOW ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34092706:sgTooHCVN:m:1:1104269936:06B0EA4B2C5D67B39786E849ACE94383:r)

name: Rob Portman
subject: A big win!
body:
| Peter -- I have great news! Today, we scored a victory in the fight against drug addiction \-- my bipartisan bill to help combat the heroin epidemic passed the Senate! This bill, passed on an overwhelming bipartisan basis, would help Ohioans struggling with addiction by expanding education and prevention efforts, helping law enforcement reverse overdoses to save lives, and expanding treatment and recovery programs. We still have a lot of work to do. The prescription drug and heroin epidemic is devastating communities across Ohio. This is an issue that is affecting thousands of Ohioans. This is not a Republican issue or a Democratic issue. Please join our fight -- we must work together to turn the tide of addiction, help people put their lives back together, and end this epidemic!

[](http://www.robportman.com/join_robs_fight?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cara_update&n=1) All best,
Rob Portman [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cara_update&n=2)[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cara_update&n=3)[

subject: I Choose Cruz
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
I'm endorsing Ted Cruz for President today, and I'm asking you to join me. Ted Cruz is a fearless fighter for our constitutional rights. | [From the Desk of Carly Fiorina](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/1UMecBcX0jiNqdpnPtupv6)
---
Friend,

Yesterday, I endorsed Ted Cruz for President - and today, I'm asking you to join me.

**Ted Cruz is a fearless fighter for our constitutional rights.** Unlike the status-quo political class in D.C., Ted Cruz didn't cower the moment he set foot in Washington. Instead, he stands unequivocally for the American people.

Before tonight's debate - I'm asking you to join me and commit to supporting Ted Cruz.

If you are already supporting Senator Cruz - I'm asking you to stop what you are doing right now and contribute financially to his campaign.

On the debate stage tonight, Ted will stand up for our conservative values...

But in order for Ted to take on Donald Trump and win, [**will you make a special contribution of $35 or $50 to give Ted the much needed resources to compete - state-by-state for every possible delegate?**](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/1UMpIWw2ky9ZwnbtWWAEr3)

[ DONATE NOW ](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/1UMBfhP7EN1bCwXA4pGTn0)

Here's the truth: **Donald Trump and Hillary Clinton are two sides of the same coin.** Trump has made billions buying politicians and their influence, and Hillary Clinton has made millions selling her influence to people like Trump.

That's why we need President Ted Cruz. **Ted has spent his life protecting Americans' God-given liberties, and he always stands by his word.**

I know Ted, and he'll do the same as president.

That's why my email is so important: I need you to make a special contribution today. Your contribution will go directly to defeating Donald Trump and Hillary Clinton!

[**Yes, it's that important that you stop whatever you are doing and make a special contribution**](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/1UMMLD8cZ1SnIGJGbSN8iX) because in order for Ted to win...he must have the resources to compete in a state-by-state race for the nomination.

Before I sign off, one last thing.

There is good news...**in the most recent polls Ted beats Donald Trump by 17 points in a one-on-one race.**

And Ted, unlike Trump, defeats Hillary Clinton in a one-on-one race.

Again, I need you now to help me support Ted Cruz. He is our best hope to return a true conservative to the White House and reverse the disastrous eight years of Barack Obama's presidency.

But he can't do it without you.

[**Click here to make an instant donation to support Ted Cruz for President.**](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/1UMYhYrijgJzOQvMjlTneU)

Thank you,

Carly Fiorina
